here are the options:

Option A: Oakwood Heights. A historic district characterized by cobblestone streets, manicured colonial-style estates, private country clubs, and a strong emphasis on classical architecture and traditional European garden design.

Option B: The Meridian District. A vibrant, modern urban hub featuring high-end lofts, world-class jazz clubs, diverse culinary fusion restaurants, a growing community of artists, and a rich tapestry of multicultural street festivals.

Option C: Silver Lake Estates. A burgeoning suburban area with new builds, large family homes, proximity to great schools, massive shopping malls, and a mix of diverse families looking for space and comfort.
